message:
Fix diarization transcript fallback and command pipe output loss

normalize_whisper_diarization: extract segments before building the
transcript so an empty/missing transcript_txt field falls back to
joining segment text, preventing silent blank transcripts.

process.rs: replace recv_timeout(100ms) with blocking recv() via a
new recv_pipe_output helper. The old timeout could silently truncate
large stdout/stderr payloads when the reader thread hadn't finished
within 100ms after process exit. Also drain both pipes on cancellation
to avoid leaked reader threads.

Add tests: diarization segment fallback, large stdout preservation,
and large stderr on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
